examples: It has the advantages of both cashmere and mulberry silk.
The room was so still that I could hear mockingbirds quarreling in the fruitless mulberry trees.
Ethnic Yi women hoe a field to plant mulberry on a hillside on the outskirts of Kaiyuan in Yunan.
Nearby, several Americans were resting in the shade of some mulberry trees, talking to each other.
Sevier constantly monitors his 4-by-6-foot aquarium smoker, in which he uses split elm and mulberry logs.
